task: Using current logicDocument schema only, wire the Group B drop targets dropTarget_sgkz8l, dropTarget_oqxqca, dropTarget_91r68s, and dropTarget_kepofp so each target lights itself when hit, and reset all four lit states on drain drain_9uxn54. Do not change geometry or add new elements.

Build valid patch JSON for A-Targ only. The GRPB bank is dropTarget_sgkz8l, dropTarget_oqxqca, dropTarget_91r68s, and dropTarget_kepofp. Each target should turn on its own lamp when hit, and drain_9uxn54 should reset the Group B target lights. Use the current logicDocument schema and keep unrelated behavior unchanged.

Create Group B target-lighting logic for A-Targ with no geometry edits. Use switchRegistry, stateTable, lampBindings, actionRules, and resetRules in the current schema. The four GRPB targets are dropTarget_sgkz8l, dropTarget_oqxqca, dropTarget_91r68s, and dropTarget_kepofp, and the drain trigger source is drain_9uxn54.
